base_annual_fee.source_clause: Base Annual Service Fee of INR 32,00,00,000 (Rupees Thirty Two Crores only) for Year 1, inclusive of the Offshore Risk Premium of INR 3,20,00,000 (10% of onshore equivalent fee). Fee escalates per Clause 7.

base_monthly_fee.source_clause: Monthly fee of INR 2,66,66,667 (1/12 of Base Annual Fee including offshore premium) payable by the 3rd working day of each month.

escalation.source_clause: Annual escalation on April 1 using WPI All Commodities January index. Escalation is subject to a FLOOR of 2% per annum (offshore cost inflation minimum) and a CAP of 10% per annum.

variable_component.source_clause: Offshore variable maintenance charge of INR 0.08 per net kWh exported (double the onshore equivalent), reflecting vessel mobilisation, marine logistics and diving support costs, billed monthly.

availability_guarantee_pct.source_clause: Offshore Wind Turbine Availability Guarantee of 92.0% per annum (lower than onshore due to weather window constraints and marine access restrictions). Force Majeure exclusions apply as per Schedule 4.

ld_rate_per_pp.source_clause: STEPPED LD SCHEDULE: 0–2PP shortfall: 3.0% of BAF per PP. 2–5PP shortfall: 4.5% of BAF per PP. Above 5PP: 6.0% of BAF per PP. Capped at 20% of BAF.

ld_cap_pct.source_clause: Aggregate LD liability capped at 20% of Base Annual Fee per Contract Year regardless of availability shortfall.

bonus_threshold_pct.source_clause: PERFORMANCE CORRIDOR: Bonus threshold at 94.0% (2PP above guarantee). Bonus rate: 2% of BAF per PP between 94–96%. Above 96%: 3% per PP. Maximum bonus: 10% of BAF.

bonus_rate_per_pp.source_clause: Base bonus rate 2.0% of BAF per PP above 94.0% threshold. Rate increases to 3.0% per PP above 96.0%. See performance corridor in Clause 12.2.

payment_terms_days.source_clause: Extended payment terms of 60 days reflecting PSU procurement cycle. Invoice must be accompanied by SCADA-certified generation report and marine access log.

late_payment_interest.source_clause: Overdue amounts attract interest at SBI MCLR (1-year) + 4% per annum. Additional mobilisation cost recovery clause applies if late payment delays scheduled offshore maintenance.

renewal_notice_months.source_clause: 24 months written notice required for non-renewal or major scope change. Long notice reflects offshore supply chain lead times.

validation_warnings: EDGE CASE: Stepped LD schedule — engine uses base rate (3.0%) for all PP. True exposure may be higher for >2PP shortfalls.
EDGE CASE: Escalation floor of 2% — even if WPI is 0% or negative, fee increases by minimum 2%. Check engine handles floor correctly.
HIGH RISK: MCLR + 4% late payment interest is the highest in portfolio.
NOTE: 24-month renewal notice is unusual — 2 years lead time for renegotiation.
